subtopics.title: Classes of Food Nutrients
subtopics.teaching_note: Carbohydrates: energy food (garri, rice, yam, bread). Proteins: body building (beans, fish, meat, eggs). Fats: energy storage (palm oil, butter, groundnut oil). Vitamins: protect against diseases (fruits, vegetables). Minerals: for strong bones and blood (milk, vegetables). Water: for digestion and temperature control. Balanced diet: contains all nutrients in right proportions. Nigerian foods: egusi soup (protein), eba (carbohydrate), ugu vegetable (vitamins/minerals).
